q: 做个 mailbox client,从 DT 拿通道、发消息、收回调怎么写?

corruptions.why: 编造的发送函数,真名 mbox_send_message

forbidden: 非 devm 通道用完不 mbox_free_channel
rubric: 填 mbox_client(dev/rx_callback/tx_block/tx_tout),mbox_request_channel 拿通道(判 IS_ERR,byname 用 _byname),mbox_send_message 发(tx_block 时阻塞),收消息进 rx_callback;用完 mbox_free_channel
